commands.review_summary:
The PR imports `formatErrorMessage` into `src/cli/skills-cli.ts` and `src/cli/update-cli.ts`, replacing caught-error `String(err)` logging in skills and update command handlers.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence repro path: force an affected skills or update command helper to throw a plain object or caused Error on current main, and the wrapper reaches `defaultRuntime.error(String(err))`. I did not run the command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor proof and maintainer merge judgment, not a concrete code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: fix(cli): use formatErrorMessage for structured error output in skills and update commands
